dwcaExtension.name: DwC-A extension
dwcaExtension.description: A short description of the component should be placed here

locationId.name: Location ID
locationId.description: Publishers can choose to assign IDs to the location. This field is not normalized, meaning that you search data as provided by the publisher.

hasGeospatialIssues.name: Has geospatial issues
hasGeospatialIssues.description: Whether the record has geospatial issues.

collectionKey.name: Collection
collectionKey.description: The collection in GrSciColl this record was matched to

predicate.name: Complex query
predicate.description: A complex query for filtering records.

taxonomicStatus.name: Status
taxonomicStatus.description: The number of held specimens stated in the description. This number does not reflect how many records have been digitized and shared.

taxonRank.name: Rank
taxonRank.description: The number of held specimens stated in the description. This number does not reflect how many records have been digitized and shared.

numberSpecimens.name: Number of specimens
numberSpecimens.description: The number of held specimens stated in the description. This number does not reflect how many records have been digitized and shared.

specimensInGbif.name: Specimens in GBIF
specimensInGbif.description: Number of specimen records published on GBIF and linked to the institution entry.

iucnRedListCategory.name: IUCN Global Red List Category
iucnRedListCategory.description: The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species groups taxa by how threatened they are.

geoDistance.name: Distance from coordinates
geoDistance.description: Filter on records within a given distance from a point

geometry.name: Location
geometry.description: Filter on records within a given geometric area. The area can be a point, a line, a polygon, or a bounding box.

relevance.name: Relevance
relevance.description: How is GBIF used in the literature.

topics.name: Topic
topics.description: What are the topics of the record.

audiences.name: Audience
audiences.description: Who are the audiences for the resource.

biostratigraphy.name: Biostratigraphy
biostratigraphy.description: The biostratigraphic context of the record.

lithostratigraphy.name: Lithostratigraphy
lithostratigraphy.description: The lithostratigraphic context of the record.

geologicalTime.name: Geological time
geologicalTime.description: The geological time context of the record.

purposes.name: Topic
purposes.description: What are the purposes of the resource.

eventDate.name: Event date
eventDate.description: When was the record collected or observed.

gbifId.name: GBIF ID
gbifId.description: The unique identifier for the record in the GBIF database.

organismQuantityType.name: Organism quantity type
organismQuantityType.description: The type of measurement for the "organism quantity".

pathway.name: Pathway
pathway.description: The pathway through which the organism was introduced.

associatedSequences.name: Associated sequences
associatedSequences.description: An identifier to any sequences associated with the record. Typically a URL.

degreeOfEstablishment.name: Degree of establishment
degreeOfEstablishment.description: The degree to which the organism is established in the environment.

endDayOfYear.name: End day of year
endDayOfYear.description: The day of the year on which the event ended.

startDayOfYear.name: Start day of year
startDayOfYear.description: The day of the year on which the event started.

previousIdentifications.name: Previous identifications
previousIdentifications.description: Previous taxon identifications associated with the record.

lastInterpreted.name: Last interpreted
lastInterpreted.description: Time of the last interpretation of the record.

alternativeCode.name: Alternative code
alternativeCode.description: Any additional code that is already in use for the same record in other contexts (for example, historical codes).

identifier.name: Identifier
identifier.description: A short description of the component should be placed here

discipline.name: Discipline
discipline.description: The research disciplines supported by the institution.

collectionContentType.name: Content type
collectionContentType.description: The type of objects available in the collection

preservationType.name: Preservation type
preservationType.description: The method used to preserve the objects available in the collection

biomeType.name: Biome type
biomeType.description: The type of biome with which the organism is associated.

objectClassification.name: Object classification
objectClassification.description: The classification of the object(s) in the collection.

taxonKey.name: Scientific name
taxonKey.description: The scientific name as it appears in the GBIF backbone taxonomy. These names are normalized to ease search across datasets. It is possible that an originally-provided name might be misinterpreted or unknown. To search the names as provided use the "Verbatim scientific name" filter.

taxonKeyGrSciColl.name: Scientific name
taxonKeyGrSciColl.description: Filter using the scientific names listed in the collection descriptors provided in the collection's metadata, noting that not all collections include metadata descriptors and the names are often at higher taxonomic ranks such as order or family.

basisOfRecord.name: Basis of record
basisOfRecord.description: The nature of the evidence upon which the record is based.

institutionCode.name: Institution code
institutionCode.description: The code (or acronym) for the institution having custody of the object(s) or information referred to in the record.

catalogNumber.name: Catalogue number
catalogNumber.description: The identifier for the record within a catalogue or collection.

mediaType.name: Media type
mediaType.description: The types of media accessible for this record.

occurrenceIssue.name: Issues and flags
occurrenceIssue.description: The types of issues or flags of potential interest discovered in processing the data.

occurrenceTaxonomicIssue.name: Taxonomic issues and flags
occurrenceTaxonomicIssue.description: The types of taxonomic issues or flags of potential interest discovered during processing of the data.

occurrenceCountry.name: Country or area
occurrenceCountry.description: The country or territory where the event occurred

grsciCollCountry.description: Country or territory in the record's address

preparations.name: Preparations
preparations.description: How the specimen has been prepared (e.g. dried)

repatriated.name: Repatriated
repatriated.description: Whether the record has been repatriated to the country of origin.

publishingCountryCode.name: Publishing country or area
publishingCountryCode.description: The ISO code for the country or territory in which the data publisher is located

q.name: Full text search
q.description: Full text search across several fields

elevation.name: Elevation
elevation.description: The distance above a vertical reference point (usually mean sea level or a geoid) in metres.

license.name: Licence
license.description: The legal licence or waiver under which the record is shared.

datasetKey.name: Dataset
datasetKey.description: The title of the dataset under which the record is shared.

datasetId.name: dwc:datasetID
datasetId.description: The publishers internal ID for the dataset the record is associated with. Notice that this is different from the datasetKey used on GBIF for the dataset.

publisherKey.name: Publisher
publisherKey.description: The name of the organization responsible for sharing the dataset in which the record is included.

gbifPublisherKey.name: GBIF publisher
gbifPublisherKey.description: The name of the organization responsible for sharing the dataset in which the record is included.

hostingOrganizationKey.name: Hosting organization
hostingOrganizationKey.description: The name of the organization hosting the dataset in which the record is published.

countriesOfCoverage.name: Country or area of coverage
countriesOfCoverage.description: Which countries are covered by the record.

collectionDescriptorCountry.name: Country or area of coverage
collectionDescriptorCountry.description: Which countries does the collection have specimens from. Note that not all collections have this information filled.

typeStatus.name: Type status
typeStatus.description: The type designation of a specimen.

year.name: Year
year.description: The year in which the event occurred.

sampleSizeUnit.name: Sample size unit
sampleSizeUnit.description: The unit of measurement for the "sample size value".

coordinateUncertainty.name: Coordinate uncertainty
coordinateUncertainty.description: A measure of the minimum distance in metres from a coordinate within which a locality might be interpreted to be.

distanceFromCentroidInMeters.name: Distance from centroid in metres
distanceFromCentroidInMeters.description: The distance in meters from the country centroid.

depth.name: Depth
depth.description: The distance below a local surface, in metres.

organismQuantity.name: Organism quantity
organismQuantity.description: The value for the quantity of organisms, where the type of measurement is given in the "Organism quantity type".

sampleSizeValue.name: Sample size value
sampleSizeValue.description: The value for the size of a sample, where the units of measurement are given in the "Sample size unit".

relativeOrganismQuantity.name: Relative organism quantity
relativeOrganismQuantity.description: The amount of biological material relative to the size of a sample, calculated as organismQuantity per sampleSize when the organismQuantityType and sampleSizeUnit are unambiguous.

month.name: Month
month.description: The integer month in which the event occurred.

continent.name: Continent
continent.description: The name of the continent in which the location occurs.  This field is not inferred but only populated if provided by the dataset publisher. Applying this filter may exclude relevant records.

protocol.name: Publishing protocol
protocol.description: The technical protocol through which the dataset is shared.

establishmentMeans.name: Establishment means
establishmentMeans.description: The means by which the organism was introduced to a given place at a given time.

lifeStage.name: Life stage
lifeStage.description: The life stage of the organism.

recordedBy.name: Recorded by
recordedBy.description: The names of the person, people, groups or organizations responsible for recording the original occurrence.

fieldNumber.name: Field number
fieldNumber.description: The identifier assigned to the location by the collector.

verbatimTaxonId.name: Verbatim taxon ID
verbatimTaxonId.description: The taxon identifier as provided by the publisher.

islandGroup.name: Island group
islandGroup.description: The name of the island group of the location.

island.name: Island
island.description: The name of the island of the location.

georeferencedBy.name: Georeferenced by
georeferencedBy.description: The names of the people, groups or organizations responsible for georeferencing the original occurrence.

datasetName.name: dwc:datasetName
datasetName.description: The name of the dataset used by the publisher. Records in a dataset might come from multiple other datasets.

programme.name: Programme
programme.description: The name of the programme with which the record is associated.

recordNumber.name: Record number
recordNumber.description: An identifier given to the occurrence at the time it was recorded.

collectionCode.name: Collection code
collectionCode.description: What collection code is assigned to the record.

projectId.name: Project ID
projectId.description: What project ID is associated with the record.

recordedById.name: Recorded by ID
recordedById.description: The identifier for the person, people, groups or organizations responsible for recording the original occurrence.

identifiedById.name: Identified by ID
identifiedById.description: The identifier for the person, people, groups or organizations responsible for determining the scientific name of the organism.

occurrenceId.name: Occurrence ID
occurrenceId.description: The unique identifier for the occurrence record.

organismId.name: Organism ID
organismId.description: The unique identifier for the organism in the record.

locality.name: Locality
locality.description: The specific part of the description of the place.

waterBody.name: Water body
waterBody.description: The name of the water body in which the location occurs.

higherGeography.name: Higher geography
higherGeography.description: Higher geography in which the record is located. This is not an interpreted field, but the original data as provided by the publisher. Multiple values can be provided.

stateProvince.name: State province
stateProvince.description: The name of the next administrative region smaller than country in which the location occurs.

gbifRegion.name: GBIF region
gbifRegion.description: The GBIF region of the location.

publishedByGbifRegion.name: Published by GBIF region
publishedByGbifRegion.description: The GBIF region in which the dataset is published.

eventId.name: Event ID
eventId.description: The unique identifier for the event in the record.

eventID.name: Event ID
eventID.description: The unique identifier for the event in the record.

parentEventId.name: Parent event ID
parentEventId.description: The unique identifier for the Parent Event in the record.

locationID.name: Location ID
locationID.description: The unique identifier for the site in the record.

measurementOrFactCount.name: Measurement count
measurementOrFactCount.description: The count of a given measurement type.

occurrenceCount.name: Occurrence count
occurrenceCount.description: Number of occurrences for the event

eventType.name: Event type
eventType.description: The type of the sampling event.

dataStructure.name: Structure
dataStructure.description: The data structure for the sampling event.

samplingProtocol.name: Sampling protocol
samplingProtocol.description: The name of, reference to or description of the method or protocol used during an event.

occurrenceStatus.name: Occurrence status
occurrenceStatus.description: The presence or absence of any organisms of the given taxon.

gadmGid.name: Administrative area
gadmGid.description: The name of any administrative area from GADM.org determined during record processing.

isInCluster.name: Has related records
isInCluster.description: This experimental feature highlights possible duplicate and/or related occurrences.

isSequenced.name: Is sequenced
isSequenced.description: Whether the record has sequence information.

active.name: Active
active.description: Whether the entry corresponds to an active collection/institution or a historical listing that no longer exists.

activeInstitution.name: Active
activeInstitution.description: Whether the entry corresponds to an active institution or a historical listing that no longer exists.

activeCollection.name: Active
activeCollection.description: Whether the entry corresponds to an active collection or a historical listing that no longer exists.

publicationDate.name: Publication date
publicationDate.description: When was the record was published

datasetType.name: Dataset type
datasetType.description: A short description of the component should be placed here

datasetSubtype.name: Dataset subtype
datasetSubtype.description: A short description of the component should be placed here

institutionKey.name: Institution
institutionKey.description: The name of the institution having custody of the object(s) or information referred to in the record.

city.name: City
city.description: City where the institution/collection can be found.

code.name: Code
code.description: The primary code that identifies the record as a whole. If you get no result, try the alternative code filter.

verbatimScientificName.name: Verbatim scientific name
verbatimScientificName.description: The scientific name as provided by the data publisher without any normalization.

networkKey.name: Network
networkKey.description: A short description of the component should be placed here

literatureType.name: Literature type
literatureType.description: What type of literature does the citation come from.

higherTaxonKey.name: Higher taxon
higherTaxonKey.description: A higher taxon to filter by.

issueEnum.name: Issues and flags
issueEnum.description: The types of issues or flags of potential interest discovered in processing the data.

humboldtBooleans.name: Humboldt extension
humboldtBooleans.description: Extended support for Darwin Core Events related to ecological inventories.

siteCount.description: Total number of individual sites surveyed during the dwc:Event.
siteCount.name: Site Count

siteNestingDescription.description: Textual description of the hierarchical sampling design.
siteNestingDescription.name: Site Nesting Description

verbatimSiteDescriptions.description: Original textual description of the site(s).
verbatimSiteDescriptions.name: Verbatim Site Descriptions

verbatimSiteNames.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of original site names.
verbatimSiteNames.name: Verbatim Site Names

geospatialScopeAreaValue.description: The numeric value for the total area of the geospatial scope of the dwc:Event.
geospatialScopeAreaValue.name: Geospatial Scope Area Value

totalAreaSampledValue.description: The numeric value for the total area surveyed during the dwc:Event.
totalAreaSampledValue.name: Total Area Sampled Value

reportedWeather.description: A list of weather or climatic conditions present during the dwc:Event.
reportedWeather.name: Reported Weather

reportedExtremeConditions.description: A description of any extreme weather or environmental conditions that may have affected the dwc:Event.
reportedExtremeConditions.name: Reported Extreme Conditions

targetHabitatScope.description: The habitats targeted for sampling during the dwc:Event.
targetHabitatScope.name: Target Habitat Scope

excludedHabitatScope.description: The habitats explicitly excluded from sampling during the dwc:Event.
excludedHabitatScope.name: Excluded Habitat Scope

eventDurationValue.description: The numeric value for the duration of the dwc:Event.
eventDurationValue.name: Event Duration Value

eventDurationUnit.description: The units associated with the eco:eventDurationValue.
eventDurationUnit.name: Event Duration Unit

targetTaxonomicScope.description: The taxonomic group(s) targeted for sampling during the dwc:Event.
targetTaxonomicScope.name: Target Taxonomic Scope

excludedTaxonomicScope.description: The taxonomic group(s) explicitly excluded from sampling during the dwc:Event.
excludedTaxonomicScope.name: Excluded Taxonomic Scope

taxonCompletenessReported.description: Statement about whether the taxonomic completeness of the dwc:Event was assessed.
taxonCompletenessReported.name: Taxon Completeness Reported

taxonCompletenessProtocols.description: A description of or reference (publication, URL) to the methods used to determine eco:taxonCompletenessReported.
taxonCompletenessProtocols.name: Taxon Completeness Protocols

isTaxonomicScopeFullyReported.description: Every dwc:Organism that was included within the taxonomic scope, and was detected during the dwc:Event, was reported.
isTaxonomicScopeFullyReported.name: Is Taxonomic Scope Fully Reported

absentTaxa.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of taxa reported absent during the dwc:Event.
absentTaxa.name: Absent Taxa

hasNonTargetTaxa.description: One or more dwc:Organisms of taxa outside the target taxonomic scope (the combination of eco:targetTaxonomicScope and eco:excludedTaxonomicScope) were detected and reported for this dwc:Event.
hasNonTargetTaxa.name: Has Non Target Taxa

nonTargetTaxa.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of taxa reported during the dwc:Event that are outside of the target taxonomic scope (the combination of eco:targetTaxonomicScope and eco:excludedTaxonomicScope).
nonTargetTaxa.name: Non Target Taxa

areNonTargetTaxaFullyReported.description: Every dwc:Organism that was outside of the target taxonomic scope (the combination of eco:targetTaxonomicScope and eco:excludedTaxonomicScope) and detected during the dwc:Event, and that was detectable using the given protocol (given in eco:protocolDescriptions and dwc:samplingProtocol), was reported.
areNonTargetTaxaFullyReported.name: Are Non Target Taxa Fully Reported

targetLifeStageScope.description: The age classes or life stages of the dwc:Organisms targeted for sampling during the dwc:Event.
targetLifeStageScope.name: Target Life Stage Scope

excludedLifeStageScope.description: The age classes or life stages of the dwc:Organisms explicitly excluded from sampling during the dwc:Event.
excludedLifeStageScope.name: Excluded Life Stage Scope

isLifeStageScopeFullyReported.description: Every dwc:Organism that was included within the life stage scope, and was detected during the dwc:Event, was reported.
isLifeStageScopeFullyReported.name: Is Life Stage Scope Fully Reported

targetDegreeOfEstablishmentScope.description: The degrees of establishment of the dwc:Organisms targeted for sampling during the dwc:Event.
targetDegreeOfEstablishmentScope.name: Target Degree Of Establishment Scope

excludedDegreeOfEstablishmentScope.description: The degrees of establishment of the dwc:Organisms explicitly excluded from sampling during the dwc:Event.
excludedDegreeOfEstablishmentScope.name: Excluded Degree Of Establishment Scope

isDegreeOfEstablishmentScopeFullyReporte.description: Every dwc:Organism that was included within the degree of establishment scope, and was detected during the dwc:Event, was reported.
isDegreeOfEstablishmentScopeFullyReporte.name: Is Degree Of Establishment Scope Fully Reported

targetGrowthFormScope.description: The growth forms or habits of the dwc:Organisms targeted for sampling during the dwc:Event.
targetGrowthFormScope.name: Target Growth Form Scope

excludedGrowthFormScope.description: The growth forms or habits of the dwc:Organisms explicitly excluded from sampling during the dwc:Event.
excludedGrowthFormScope.name: Excluded Growth Form Scope

isGrowthFormScopeFullyReported.description: Every dwc:Organism that was included within the growth form scope, and was detected during the dwc:Event, was reported.
isGrowthFormScopeFullyReported.name: Is Growth Form Scope Fully Reported

hasNonTargetOrganisms.description: One or more dwc:Organisms outside the target organismal scopes (eco:targetDegreeOfEstablishmentScope, eco:targetGrowthFormScope, and eco:targetLifeStageScope) were detected and reported for this dwc:Event.
hasNonTargetOrganisms.name: Has Non Target Organisms

verbatimTargetScope.description: The verbatim original description of the dwc:Event scope.
verbatimTargetScope.name: Verbatim Target Scope

identifiedBy.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups or organizations who assigned the dwc:Taxon to the subject.
identifiedBy.name: Identified by

identificationReferences.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of references (publication, global unique identifier, URI) used in the dwc:Identification.
identificationReferences.name: Identification References

compilationTypes.description: A statement specifying whether data reported are derived from sampling events, ancillary data compiled from other sources, or a combination of both.
compilationTypes.name: Compilation Types

compilationSourceTypes.description: The types of data sources contributing to the compilation reported.
compilationSourceTypes.name: Compilation Source Types

inventoryTypes.description: The types of search processes used to conduct the inventory.
inventoryTypes.name: Inventory Types

protocolNames.description: Categorical descriptive names for the methods used during the dwc:Event.
protocolNames.name: Protocol Names

protocolDescriptions.description: A detailed description of the methods used during the dwc:Event.
protocolDescriptions.name: Protocol Descriptions

protocolReferences.description: The references to the methods used during the dwc:Event.
protocolReferences.name: Protocol References

isAbundanceReported.description: The number of dwc:Organisms collected or observed was reported.
isAbundanceReported.name: Is Abundance Reported

isAbundanceCapReported.description: A maximum number of dwc:Organisms was reported, as specified or restricted by the protocol used.
isAbundanceCapReported.name: Is Abundance Cap Reported

abundanceCap.description: The reported maximum number of dwc:Organisms.
abundanceCap.name: Abundance Cap

isVegetationCoverReported.description: A vegetation cover metric was reported.
isVegetationCoverReported.name: Is Vegetation Cover Reported

isLeastSpecificTargetCategoryQuantityInc.description: The total detected quantity for a dwc:Taxon (including subcategories thereof) in a dwc:Event is given explicitly in a single record (dwc:organismQuantity value) for that dwc:Taxon.
isLeastSpecificTargetCategoryQuantityInc.name: Is Least Specific Target Category Quantity Inclusive

hasVouchers.description: Specimen vouchers were collected during the dwc:Event.
hasVouchers.name: Has Vouchers

voucherInstitutions.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of the names or acronyms of the institutions where vouchers collected during the dwc:Event were deposited.
voucherInstitutions.name: Voucher Institutions

hasMaterialSamples.description: Material samples were collected during the dwc:Event.
hasMaterialSamples.name: Has Material Samples

materialSampleTypes.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of material sample types collected during the dwc:Event.
materialSampleTypes.name: Material Sample Types

samplingPerformedBy.description: A person, group or organization responsible for recording the dwc:Event.
samplingPerformedBy.name: Sampling Performed By

isSamplingEffortReported.description: The sampling effort associated with the dwc:Event was reported.
isSamplingEffortReported.name: Is Sampling Effort Reported

samplingEffortProtocol.description: A description of or reference (publication or URL) to the methods used to determine the sampling effort.
samplingEffortProtocol.name: Sampling Effort Protocol

samplingEffortValue.description: The numeric value for the sampling effort expended during the dwc:Event.
samplingEffortValue.name: Sampling Effort Value

samplingEffortUnit.description: The units associated with the eco:samplingEffortValue.
samplingEffortUnit.name: Sampling Effort Unit
